sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 Patch | 2024-04-04 | STRY0148573 - Create a fix script for OU Privacy for existing templates/ template tasks STRY0148573 - Create a fix script for OU Privacy for existing templates/ template tasks Find all Tasks where the task privacy setting does not match the Primary Office's Top OU privacy and update them.
Release Introduced: 2.8.3 - Only needs to be run a single time
Purpose: - This script changes the privacy of the task to match the privacy of the Primary Office's Top OU - Tasks created by running templates were not setting the privacy correctly. - The template run code was corrected to properly set the privacy as tasks are created - This script corrects the bad data on tasks created prior to this release
Validation: - Open the Tasker Task table - /x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASprimary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy" - This will show all of the records that will be changed
- Run the script - Refresh the page, all mismatches should be gone from the list
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.8.4 Patch - Template Privacy
